forbidden.name: no-circular
forbidden.comment: Circular dependencies are not allowed as they make the code harder to reason about and refactor.

forbidden.name: sandbox-app-isolation
forbidden.comment: Sandbox applications must not import from the core backend, database, or frontend directly to preserve sandbox boundaries. They must use the @packages/sdk.

forbidden.name: sandbox-app-isolation-alias
forbidden.comment: Sandbox applications must not import using core aliases (@backend, @database, @frontend) to preserve boundaries.
